title: 2. Goal setting
text:
• A patient's goal can be very subjective. His/her biggest concern part may be the least
problematic  part  which  needs  intervention.  That  is  why  practitioner  needs  to
understand his/her expectations clearly. Only enough communication can solve this
problem.
• When you consult with a patient, use the photo taken in the clinic. Photo can make you
and patient understand current condition and goal more clearly.
• The actual treatment goal should be reasonable and realistic.
